execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut line_opt = io.read_line()
  while true
    match line_opt
    when None
      return Ok(())
    when Some(line)
      if not string.is_empty(line)
        let n = string.len(line)
        let category = if n <= 3
          "short"
        else if n <= 7
          "medium"
        else
          "long"
        end
        println("#{line} -> #{category}")
      end
      line_opt = io.read_line()
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
